calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Defendant/Appellant Cathy D. Adams dba CDA Consulting present.
Plaintiff/Respondent Craig Bryant dba Lessco present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Defendant/Appellant Cathy Adams testifies on behalf of herself and CDA Consulting.

Plaintiff/Respondent Craig Bryant testifiies on behalf of himself and Lessco.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court ordered Judgment be entered in favor of Plaintiff /Respondent Craig Bryant dba Lessco in the amount of $1,537.20 Principal and $70.00 Costs for a total Judgment of $1,607.20.

Exhibits referenced from the court file are returned to Plaintiff/Respondent by the Court.

JPT Jeffrey S. Ross, Clerk Vicki Mack, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Judgment Entered
